preconditions: signals contains error-related indicators
strategy: Extract structured signals from logs and user instructions
Select an existing Gene by signals match (no improvisation)
Estimate blast radius (files, lines) before editing
Apply smallest reversible patch
Validate using declared validation steps; rollback on failure
Solidify knowledge: append EvolutionEvent, update Gene/Capsule store

preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Extract signals and determine selection rationale via Selector JSON
Prefer reusing existing Gene/Capsule; only create if no match exists
Refactor prompt assembly to embed assets (genes, capsules, parent event)
Reduce noise and ambiguity; enforce strict output schema
Validate by running node index.js run and ensuring no runtime errors
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene definitions, create Capsule on success

preconditions: at least one opportunity signal is present
no active log_error signals (stability first)
strategy: Extract opportunity signals and identify the specific user need or system gap
Search existing Genes and Capsules for partial matches (avoid reinventing)
Design a minimal, testable implementation plan (prefer small increments)
Estimate blast radius; innovate changes may touch more files but must stay within constraints
Implement the change with clear validation criteria
Validate using declared validation steps; rollback on failure
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent with intent=innovate, create new Gene if pattern is novel, create Capsule on success

genes.summary: Optimize tool execution patterns by reducing redundant exec calls, improving tool selection strategy, and enforcing tool-use constraints to prevent bypass.
preconditions: agent repeatedly invokes the same tool (especially exec) without progress
tool execution bypass patterns detected
no active error signals (errors would take repair priority)
strategy: Analyze tool usage patterns to identify the root cause of repetition (wrong tool, missing context, or lack of guardrails)
Introduce strategy-level guardrails: prefer single-shot commands, batch related operations, add explicit retry limits
If tool_bypass detected, strengthen constraint enforcement in prompt assembly or tool routing
Estimate blast radius; changes should target tool routing, prompt constraints, or signal deduplication logic
Validate by confirming no regressions in existing tool tests and signal extraction accuracy
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent with intent=optimize, update Capsule on success

genes.summary: Vercel environment variable expert guidance. Use when working with .env files, vercel env commands, OIDC tokens, or managing environment-specific configuration.
preconditions: Skill env-vars has just been executed locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals from the Skill description.
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow.
Run the Skill validation commands and abort if any fails.

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097

genes.summary: Add null/undefined guards to camera agent frame processing to prevent TypeError crashes.
preconditions: camera agent frame processing encounters null or undefined values
applies to FootTrafficAgent, DwellTimeAgent, QueueMonitorAgent
strategy: Identify the failing frame access pattern in the agent's process method
Add null/undefined guards before accessing frame.data and frame.metadata
Log the null frame event with structured context (agent_id, timestamp, frame_source)
Return gracefully with a no-op result instead of raising
Validate that the agent can handle a stream of null frames without cascading failures
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with null-check pattern

genes.summary: Wrap POS API calls with retry and exponential backoff to handle transient connection failures.
preconditions: POS API calls are failing with transient network errors
applies to pos_connector, order_processor
strategy: Locate the POS API call sites in pos_connector and order_processor
Wrap each call with a retry decorator using exponential backoff (3 attempts: 0s, 2s, 4s)
After 3 consecutive failures, activate the fallback order flow
Log each retry attempt with structured context (attempt_number, delay, error_type)
Validate that the retry logic does not mask permanent failures
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with retry pattern

genes.summary: Validate dataset size before insight generation to prevent errors on empty or sparse data.
preconditions: insight generation encounters empty or insufficient data
applies to InsightGenerationAgent, MarginAnalysisAgent
strategy: Add a dataset size check before the insight generation pipeline runs
If the dataset contains fewer than 10 transactions, emit a standard low-data insight instead of computing
Ensure the low-data insight follows the same output schema as normal insights
Log the low-data event with dataset size and time window for monitoring
Validate that downstream consumers handle low-data insights correctly
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with empty-data guard pattern

genes.summary: Add 30-second execution timeout to all agents to prevent pipeline stalls and hung processes.
preconditions: agent execution is taking longer than expected or stalling the pipeline
applies to all_agents
strategy: Wrap the agent's main execution method with asyncio.wait_for using a 30-second timeout
On timeout, log the event with agent_id, elapsed_time, and last known state
Return the last valid partial result if available, otherwise return a timeout sentinel
Mark the agent for restart in the orchestrator's health check loop
Validate that timeout handling does not corrupt shared state or leave locks held
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with timeout pattern

genes.summary: Validate heatmap coordinates against store dimensions to prevent index-out-of-bounds errors.
preconditions: heatmap synthesis encounters coordinates outside the store space grid
applies to HeatmapSynthesisAgent
strategy: Before writing a heatmap cell, validate x/y coordinates against store_space.width and store_space.height
Clamp coordinates that are slightly out of bounds to the nearest valid cell
Discard data points with coordinates that are wildly out of range (>2x bounds)
Log discarded or clamped points with source camera_id for calibration review
Validate that the heatmap output grid has no gaps or artifacts from clamping
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with bounds-check pattern

genes.summary: Check Silero VAD confidence before Whisper transcription to avoid hallucinations on silent segments.
preconditions: Whisper is producing hallucinated text from silent or near-silent audio segments
applies to WhisperLiveKitSTT
strategy: Before sending an audio segment to Whisper, check Silero VAD confidence score
If VAD confidence is below 0.7, skip transcription and wait for the next voiced segment
Log skipped segments with VAD score, segment duration, and audio source for tuning
Ensure segment boundaries are correctly maintained when skipping silent segments
Validate that skipping does not introduce timing drift in the transcription stream
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with VAD-gate pattern

genes.summary: Handle database connection pool exhaustion with jitter retry and circuit breaker fallback.
preconditions: database connections are being exhausted or failing repeatedly
applies to all_database_writers
strategy: Add connection timeout handling with jitter-based retry to avoid thundering herd
Log pool exhaustion events with current pool size, active connections, and waiting queries
Implement a circuit breaker that switches to read-only mode after 5 consecutive connection failures
When circuit breaker is open, queue write operations for replay when connection recovers
Validate that read-only fallback does not silently drop critical writes
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with connection-resilience pattern

genes.summary: Enforce portal_context filter on all user-owned data queries to prevent cross-portal data leakage.
preconditions: user-facing data queries are returning data from other portals
applies to all_portal_queries
strategy: Audit the failing query to identify the missing portal_context filter
Add portal_context filter to every user-owned data query at the repository/query layer
Never allow a query to execute without a portal_context filter on user-owned tables
Add a query interceptor or middleware that rejects unscoped queries before execution
Validate that no query path can bypass the portal_context enforcement
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene store with scope-enforcement pattern
